item.description:
**API Exploration & Error Reproduction**

This folder contains requests used to explore the Wise API, reproduce errors for Scenario 1, and gain hands-on understanding of the API flow.

item.name: Scenario 3

item.description:
# Wise Quote Integration - Sandbox Demo

This collection demonstrates the essential flow for creating a quote via Wise API.

## Setup

1. Import this collection
    
2. Create an environment with:
    
    - `baseUrl`: [https://api.sandbox.transferwise.tech](https://api.sandbox.transferwise.tech)
        
    - `full access token`: \[your sandbox token\]
        

## Running the demo

1. Run "Profile ID" - extracts your personal profile ID
    
2. Run "Create Quote" - creates a quote, extracts quote ID
    
3. Run "Update Quote" (optional) - modifies the quote amount
    

All IDs are auto-extracted and stored in environment variables.
